# UC-11.6.7 · Proofpoint TAP VIP and Executive Mailbox Targeted Threat Analysis

## Description

Executives face disproportionate spear-phishing and BEC risk. Filtering TAP telemetry to a curated VIP roster surfaces targeted campaigns, attachment malware, and malicious URLs aimed at leadership mailboxes.

## Value

Enables executive-protection programs with measurable threat volume per leader and informs close-hold briefings without drowning analysts in org-wide noise.

## Implementation

(1) Maintain `vip_mailboxes.csv` under change control with HR or EA teams. (2) Normalize recipient fields for multi-recipient messages (`mvzip` / `mvexpand` if needed). (3) Restrict dashboard ACLs. (4) Map to physical protection for travel risk. (5) Review monthly with CISO staff.

## SPL

```spl
index=email sourcetype="proofpoint_tap_siem" earliest=-30d
| eval rcpt=lower(coalesce(recipient, Recipient, rcpt_to, ""))
| lookup vip_mailboxes.csv email AS rcpt OUTPUT title org_unit
| where isnotnull(title)
| eval cls=coalesce(classification, Classification, "")
| eval threat=coalesce(threatType, ThreatType, "")
| stats count values(cls) as classifications values(threat) as threat_types values(subject) as subjects by rcpt title
| sort -count
```

## Visualization

Table (recipient, title, threat counts), heatmap (exec × threat type), single-value (VIP threats this week).

## References

- [Proofpoint TAP SIEM API documentation](https://help.proofpoint.com/Threat_Insight_Dashboard/API_Documentation/SIEM_API)
